title: Argo CD Repo Server TLS or Git Fetch Errors
app: Universal Forwarder / OpenShift logging agent shipping `argocd-repo-server` container logs
spl:
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:server"
| search "rpc error" OR "authentication required" OR "x509" OR "certificate" OR "repository"
| rex field=msg "repository[\"']?(?<repo>[^\"'\s]+)"
| stats count by repo, host
| where count>=10
| sort -count
description: Git credential or TLS issues block manifest generation for many applications at once.
value: Detects upstream Git access failures before widespread `Unknown` sync states appear.
implementation: Enable structured logging on repo-server; extract `level`, `msg`, `repo`. Page when error rate doubles baseline.
visualization: Bar chart (errors by repo), Line chart (error rate).

references.title: Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring App for Argo CD (GitHub)
